chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D – 6236 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.26121/2025 3. For hearing of main case 26.02.2026 Mr. Yousuf Khalid Anwar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Anas Habib, Advocate for respondent Nos. 2 and 3. Mr. Hakim Ali Shaikh, Addl. A.G. Sindh. ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for respondent Nos. 2 and 3 files counter reply to the petition on behalf of respondent Nos. 2 and 3, taken on record. Learned counsel are ad-idem that the controversy under pinning this matter is covered by the order made by a learned Division Bench of this Court on 21.01.2025 in C.P. No. D-2689 of 2017 and connected cases. They seek disposal of the matter accordingly. So ordered. The petition accordingly stands disposed of in light of the aforementioned order, which shall apply mutatis mutandis to instant matter. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
